violations.text: No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. The establishment does not employ an on-site individual that is certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Hotel Staff member to be registered for a Food Safety Course as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. A staff member is to successfully complete a food safety course and submit application for Certified Food Safety Manager License as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025

Cartons of Raw/Liquid Eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw Egg Product was relocated for proper storage in refrigeration at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2025
At the time of inspection, the 3-bay sink faucet was observed to be leaking/dripping between uses. Equipment is to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Hotel Staff member to be registered for a Food Safety Course as soon as possible. (Per staff member, Food Safety Class and Test are to be taken.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Current Food Safety Manager Licensed individual listed for the establishment is no longer working. A staff member is to successfully complete a food safety course and submit application for Certified Food Safety Manager License as soon as possible. (Per staff member, Food Safety Class and Test are to be taken.) Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

Individual Cream Cheese Packets were observed held at in a container on ice at 61 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. (Per staff member, cream cheese packet covers fall off if left directly in ice.) Individual Cream Cheese packets were moved to a bowl and placed in the counter mini fridge for proper cold holding at the time of inspection. Cream Cheese packets are to be held in refrigeration for proper temperature control. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/04/2024

No person in charge certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. Hotel Staff member to register for a Food Safety Course as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety that is registered/licensed with the RIDOH Center for Food Protection. Current Food Safety Manager Licensed individual listed for the establishment is no longer working. A staff member is to successfully complete a food safety course and submit application for Certified Food Safety Manager License as soon as possible. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

At the time of inspection, Individual packets of cream cheese, that do require refrigeration, was observed held at 54 degrees Fahrenheit on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC is to maintain the cream cheese on ice or in refrigeration for proper temperature control during breakfast service. Cream Cheeses moved to refrigeration at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024

At the time of inspection, the dish machine was observed to be leaking out the base of the unit door during times of use. Per the kitchen staff, the internal filter gets clogged and needs to be cleaned for proper drainage. Unit is to be routinely cleaned to prevent overflowing/leaking of water at times of use. New Violation. Correct By: 03/21/2024
The facility is lacking thermo-labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2024
